description: INSERT ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE (upsert) with RETURNING *

rust-sqlx.row_struct:
#[derive(Debug, sqlx::FromRow)]
pub struct UpsertUserRow {
    pub id: i32,
    pub name: String,
    pub email: String,
    pub created_at: chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>,
}

name: upsert
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW());
